docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $515.25 FILED BY LUBECK SUSAN AS TO DEFENDANT REESE CAMILLE CAMERON VICTORIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-17-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
